vocab.example: As a child, I had boundless energy and would spend hours playing tag with the neighborhood kids.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng bay bổng/huyền ảo
vocab.example: I possessed a fanciful imagination, often transforming cardboard boxes into elaborate spaceships.

vocab.meaning: các chuyến tham quan/dã ngoại ngoài trời
vocab.example: Weekly outdoor excursions to the nearby forest were the highlight of my childhood summers.

vocab.meaning: niềm vui tự nhiên/không gò bó
vocab.example: There was a sense of uninhibited joy in simply splashing around in muddy puddles after a rainstorm.

vocab.meaning: những nỗ lực/hoạt động sáng tạo nghệ thuật
vocab.example: My parents always encouraged my artistic endeavors, even when I decided to paint the garage walls.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách/tư duy
vocab.example: During my formative years, I was obsessed with assembling intricate LEGO structures for hours on end.

vocab.meaning: trò tiêu khiển thong dong/không lo âu
vocab.example: Cycling through the village outskirts was my favorite carefree pastime back then.
Playing strategic board games significantly aided my cognitive development and problem-solving skills.
Baking cookies with my grandmother was a wonderful sensory experience involving the aroma of cinnamon and vanilla.

vocab.meaning: sự gắn kết xã hội/tính tập thể
vocab.example: Traditional folk games provided a sense of social cohesion among all the children in my community.
